plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to cut risk.
Trim SMH and SPY to reduce sector and single-name concentration.
Add XLV for defensive sector exposure and ANET for strong tech.
This shifts the book towards stability and broad market exposure.
Aims for capital preservation with modest growth potential.
Expect lower volatility and smaller drawdowns.
conservative.read: This plan prioritizes capital preservation, aiming for ~1.5% monthly return. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, accepting lower potential upside for greater stability and lower drawdowns.

plan: Trim SOXL to reduce leveraged ETF risk.
Trim SPY and SMH to lower concentration in broad index and semis.
Add XLK for tech exposure, and DDOG and ANET for strong growth names.
This balances broad market exposure with targeted tech growth.
Aims for risk-first growth with moderate leverage.
Expect moderate volatility and drawdowns.
balanced.read: This plan targets ~2.5% monthly return by balancing growth and risk. It reduces concentration and leverage while adding quality tech names. Expect moderate volatility and drawdowns, with a focus on risk management.

plan: Trim SPY and QQQI to free up capital for higher-conviction plays.
Add SOXL and TQQQ to increase leveraged ETF exposure.
Add ANET and DDOG, focusing on top-rated, high-potential tech names.
This plan concentrates exposure in high-scoring tech and leveraged ETFs.
Aims for aggressive growth, accepting higher risk and potential drawdowns.
Expect amplified gains and losses, with daily leverage decay impact.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly return by leaning into high-scoring tech and leveraged ETFs. It accepts significantly higher risk, concentration, and potential drawdowns. Be aware of amplified losses and the daily decay of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) and high-beta tech (CRWD) to cut risk.
Trim SMH to reduce volatile sector exposure.
Increase QQQI for income generation and SPY for broad market stability.
This shifts the portfolio towards income generation and capital preservation.
Aims for steady monthly distributions with low volatility.
Expect modest returns and significantly reduced drawdowns.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets ~1% monthly return through stable income-generating assets. It minimizes leverage and volatile growth stocks, prioritizing capital preservation and reliable distributions. Expect lower growth potential but significantly reduced risk.
